_meta.purpose: Manual overrides for the observer-note miner in scripts/build_species_notes.py. The regex passes are aggressive on purpose; this file is the persistence layer for human judgement. Edits here survive re-runs.
_meta.excludesShape: Each entry drops one auto-observer note. Match is case-insensitive prefix on the quote text (i.e. how the quote starts after stripping). 'species' is the canonical name.
_meta.manualQuotesShape: Each entry pins a quote to a species — for cases where the regex misses something worth surfacing. Same shape as auto-observer notes.

excludes.quotePrefix: On sea in front of the the first numbered beach huts
excludes.reason: Location reference ('first numbered beach huts'), not a first-observation.

excludes.quotePrefix: Not as numerous as they usually are lately
excludes.reason: The 'first' refers to GND and cormorants, not Grebe — the note is logged against Grebe but the rare-observation is about other species.
